function.name: subagent_bug_investigator
function.description: Run the bug_investigator sub-agent to analyze the codebase, identify bugs, determine root causes, and apply precise fixes or patches.

agent.description: The specialist agent to run for debugging tasks. This agent performs end-to-end bug investigation including analysis, root cause identification, and patch generation.

task.description: A clear description of the bug or issue to investigate, including symptoms, failures, or unexpected behavior.

context.description: Relevant scoped context such as file paths, logs, stack traces, recent changes, or failing tests to assist in debugging.
